summary: Good‑quality soundboard recording that shines on the first set and a smoking Truckin' > Smokestack Lightning > High Time sequence, but the second set splits opinion.
review: The source sounds solid overall, though one reviewer notes a phase‑inverted channel that creates an odd stereo image. The first set is widely praised while opinions on the second set range from disappointing to highlighting the Looks Like Rain/Scarlet‑Fire jam as the show’s high point. Guest harmonica on Smokestack Lightning adds a special treat.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is mixed (strong first set, divided second set) and recording is generally good but has a notable phase‑inversion flaw; the combined weighted score lands in the mid‑range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear overall sound, but one channel is phase‑inverted causing an odd stereo effect; otherwise a nicely balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is consistently praised; second set is controversial, with some listeners disliking the LLR segment while others hail it as the highlight.
